prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约27189→35450→40324→64306（联合培养）→约39000（普通类），整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1.2万名；2025年基准位次约39000名；本省物理类计划2021–2024年分别为2915→3072→3123→3183人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划3591人，较2025年约3250人扩招约10.5%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第79名，近年排名稳定在75–80区间，学校层次稳固；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第70、评价一般，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低，未出现明显报考热度异常信号；心理学A+、马克思主义理论A、教育学A-、体育学A-，师范类学科实力突出，对有志于教育行业的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，师范/教育类呈分化观望态势；广东省2026年物理类考生45.6万人，较2025年44.0万人增加约3.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；华南师范大学位于广州市，为广东省属重点师范院校，本省招生占比极高（约90%以上），省内考生报考意愿稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类计划扩招约10.5%缓解竞争、本省考生增加约3.6%加剧竞争，以及学校声誉平稳、专业热度分化等因素，在2025年基准约39000名基础上，扩招效应略大于考生增加效应，预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约41600名，区间41100–42100名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 27189 → 35450 → 40324 → 64306 (joint training) → about 39000 (regular class), showing a continuous downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 12,000 places in the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 39,000; provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2024 were 2915 → 3072 → 3123 → 3183 respectively, with a slight annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 3591, an increase of about 10.5% compared to the 2025 plan of about 3250, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 79th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable position in the 75–80 range in recent years, indicating a solid school level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 70th with average reviews, and short video platform exposure is moderately low, showing no obvious abnormal signals in application enthusiasm; Psychology A+, Marxist Theory A, Education A-, Sports Science A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, strongly attracting candidates aspiring to the education industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to have high social popularity, while teacher-training/education majors show a divided wait-and-see attitude; in 2026, there are 456,000 Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, a provincial key teacher-training university in Guangdong, with a very high proportion of provincial enrollment (over 90%), and stable willingness of provincial candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the approximately 10.5% expansion of Physics Category enrollment in 2026 easing competition, the approximately 3.6% increase in provincial candidates intensifying competition, and the stable school reputation with divided major popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of about 39,000, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect, so the ranking is expected to decline slightly; the predicted minimum ranking is about 41,600, with a range of 41,100–42,100.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated from approximately 6207 → 10569 → 10763 → 9821 → 12194, showing an overall trend of moving backward after fluctuations. After a brief recovery in 2024, it moved backward again in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 12194. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 1560 → 1512 → 1427 → 1302 → 1404 students, showing an overall decreasing trend. The 2026 plan is 1241 students, a reduction of about 11.6% compared to 1404 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 79th, with stable rankings in the 75–80 range in recent years, indicating a solid university level. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 70th, with average reviews; exposure on short video platforms is moderately low, with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. Psychology is A+, Marxist Theory is A, Education is A-, and Physical Education is A-, highlighting strong teacher-training disciplines, which strongly attract candidates interested in the education industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher-training/education majors shows a differentiated and wait-and-see trend, with Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese majors having relatively high recommendation popularity. In 2026, there are 326,200 History Category candidates in Guangdong Province, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, a provincial key teacher-training university in Guangdong, with a very high proportion of provincial enrollment (about 90% or more), and stable application willingness among provincial candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the significant reduction of about 11.6% in the 2026 History Category plan, and the increase of about 11.6% in provincial candidates, both supply and demand are tightening, significantly intensifying competition. Based on the 2025 baseline of 12194, the ranking is expected to move forward (smaller number, harder to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11500, with a range of 11000–12000.
